basics.description:
**Azure Amortized Cost Management** — Enterprise-grade budget management and amortized cost alerting for Azure at scale.

This platform bridges Azure's actual-cost-only budget limitation with amortized cost tracking for Reserved Instances and Savings Plans.

**Subscription guidance:** This one-click deploy is designed for **dev, sandbox, or evaluation subscriptions** where Azure Policies do not restrict storage key access. For production or enterprise subscriptions with strict security policies (e.g. `allowSharedKeyAccess` deny policies, private endpoint requirements), clone the repository and use **Option 2: CI/CD Deploy** — see the [CI/CD Deployment Guide](https://github.com/gitpavleenbali/azure-amortized-cost-management/blob/main/docs/cicd-guide.md) for details.

[Learn more](https://github.com/gitpavleenbali/azure-amortized-cost-management)

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region where all resources will be deployed.

basics.name: environment
basics.label: Environment
basics.toolTip: Short environment name used in resource naming. Common values: dev, staging, prod, uat, sandbox, shared. Lowercase letters and numbers only (2-10 chars).
basics.placeholder: e.g. dev, staging, prod, uat, sandbox

constraints.validationMessage: Environment must be 2-10 lowercase characters (letters and numbers, must start with a letter). Examples: dev, staging, prod, uat, sandbox.

basics.name: finopsEmail
basics.label: FinOps Team Email(s)
basics.toolTip: Email address(es) for budget alerts and compliance notifications. Separate multiple emails with commas (e.g. team@contoso.com,lead@contoso.com).

constraints.validationMessage: Enter one or more valid email addresses, separated by commas.

options.text: Configure subscription-level and resource group default budgets. All amounts are in your subscription's billing currency.

elements.name: costTrackingScope
elements.label: Cost Tracking Scope
elements.toolTip: Choose what level of cost tracking to enable. 'Resource Group' tracks per-RG budgets and spend. 'Subscription' tracks total subscription spend. 'Both' gives you per-RG details plus a subscription-level rollup.

allowedValues.label: Resource Group only
allowedValues.description: Track amortized cost per resource group against individual RG budgets.

allowedValues.label: Subscription only
allowedValues.description: Track total subscription spend against the subscription-level budget.

allowedValues.label: Both (RG + Subscription)
allowedValues.description: Full tracking: per-RG details plus subscription-level rollup summary.

elements.name: subscriptionBudgetAmount
elements.label: Monthly Subscription Budget
elements.toolTip: Monthly budget amount for the entire subscription. Alerts fire at 50%, 75%, 90%, 100%, and 110%.

elements.name: defaultBudgetAmount
elements.label: Default Resource Group Budget
elements.toolTip: Default budget amount automatically assigned to new resource groups by the auto-budget Logic App.

options.text: Enable or disable platform capabilities. Start with defaults for a quick setup, or customize for your governance needs.

elements.name: enableAutoBudget
elements.label: Auto-Budget on new Resource Groups
elements.toolTip: Automatically assign a default budget when new resource groups are created via Event Grid.

elements.name: enableSelfServiceChange
elements.label: Self-Service Budget Changes
elements.toolTip: Enable an HTTP endpoint for teams to request budget increases with guardrails (floor/cap limits).

elements.name: enablePolicy
elements.label: Budget Audit Policy
elements.toolTip: Deploy an Azure Policy that flags resource groups without a budget (AuditIfNotExists).

elements.name: enableAmortizedPipeline
elements.label: Amortized Cost Pipeline (Function App)
elements.toolTip: Deploy the Function App for daily amortized cost evaluation, Log Analytics workspace, alert rules, and workbook dashboard. Requires post-deploy setup of cost export.

elements.name: enableRbacAssignment
elements.label: RBAC Role Assignments
elements.toolTip: Automatically assign required roles to Logic App and Function App managed identities (requires User Access Administrator).

elements.name: enablePostDeploy
elements.label: Post-Deploy Automation
elements.toolTip: Deploys Function App code, creates cost export, triggers data pipeline. Uses managed identity auth.

elements.name: enableFinanceBudget
elements.label: Finance Budget Tracking
elements.toolTip: Enable dual-budget model: Finance vs Technical budget variance tracking. Enable this only if your finance department provides separate budget allocations per resource group. When disabled, the Variance report section is hidden and finance budget columns are omitted — reducing dashboard noise.

allowedValues.label: Enabled
allowedValues.description: Show Finance vs Technical budget variance report. Requires finance budgets to be uploaded via CSV or API.

allowedValues.label: Disabled
allowedValues.description: Hide finance budget columns. Recommended unless your organization uses dual-budget models.

options.text: Enable private networking to deploy a VNet with private endpoints for Cosmos DB and Storage. Recommended for production and regulated environments. When disabled, all services use public endpoints with identity-based access controls.

elements.name: enablePrivateNetworking
elements.label: Enable Private Networking — Deploy VNet, private endpoints, private DNS zones, and NSG for network isolation.

elements.name: vnetName
elements.label: VNet Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the Virtual Network to create.

constraints.validationMessage: VNet name must be 2-64 characters, starting with a letter.

elements.name: vnetAddressPrefix
elements.label: VNet Address Space
elements.toolTip: Address space for the VNet. A /24 provides 256 addresses (sufficient for private endpoints and Function App subnet).

options.text: This will deploy: VNet (1 address space) → 2 subnets (private-endpoints + function-app) → NSG → 3 private DNS zones (Cosmos DB, Blob, Table) → 3 private endpoints + DNS zone groups.
By default, all resources use Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF) naming conventions. Toggle on custom naming if your organization requires specific resource names.

elements.name: useCustomNaming
elements.label: Use custom resource names — Override the default CAF naming convention for all resources.

elements.name: actionGroupNameOverride
elements.label: Action Group
elements.toolTip: Default: ag-finops-budget-alerts

elements.name: cosmosAccountNameOverride
elements.label: Cosmos DB Account
elements.toolTip: Must be globally unique, 3-44 lowercase chars. Default: cosmos-finops-{hash}

elements.name: storageAccountNameOverride
elements.label: Storage Account
elements.toolTip: Must be globally unique, 3-24 lowercase. Default: sa{env}{hash}

elements.name: functionAppNameOverride
elements.label: Function App
elements.toolTip: Must be globally unique. Default: func-finops-amortized-{hash}

elements.name: logicAppAutoBudgetNameOverride
elements.label: Auto-Budget Logic App
elements.toolTip: Default: la-finops-auto-budget

elements.name: logicAppBudgetChangeNameOverride
elements.label: Budget Change Logic App
elements.toolTip: Default: la-finops-budget-change

elements.name: logicAppBackfillNameOverride
elements.label: Backfill Logic App
elements.toolTip: Default: la-finops-backfill

elements.name: lawNameOverride
elements.label: Log Analytics Workspace
elements.toolTip: Default: law-finops-budget

elements.name: workbookNameOverride
elements.label: Workbook Dashboard
elements.toolTip: Default: FinOps Budget Compliance Dashboard

elements.name: alertHeadUpNameOverride
elements.label: HeadUp Alert Rule
elements.toolTip: Default: finops-alert-headup

elements.name: alertWarningNameOverride
elements.label: Warning Alert Rule
elements.toolTip: Default: finops-alert-warning

elements.name: alertCriticalNameOverride
elements.label: Critical Alert Rule
elements.toolTip: Default: finops-alert-critical

elements.name: postDeployIdentityNameOverride
elements.label: Post-Deploy Managed Identity
elements.toolTip: Default: id-finops-post-deploy

options.text: Optional integration settings. These can be configured after deployment.

elements.name: resourceGroupName
elements.label: Resource Group Name
elements.toolTip: Leave blank to use the default naming convention: rg-finops-governance-{environment}

constraints.validationMessage: Resource group name must be 1-90 characters (alphanumeric, periods, underscores, hyphens, parentheses).

elements.name: teamsWebhookUri
elements.label: Teams Webhook URL
elements.toolTip: Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL for budget alert notifications. Leave blank to use email-only alerts.

elements.name: functionAppKey
elements.toolTip: Function App host key for Cosmos sync. Set this after deploying the Function App code.
